title: mimulus austinae
intro: Mimulus austinae, also known as Western Monkey Flower, is a perennial plant native to the western coast of North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive shape. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mimulus austinae include its potential to alleviate anxiety, stress, and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
